items.title: Biogen makes up to $1B deal for secretive anti-inflammatory biotech
items.description:
Biogen will pay as much as $1 billion — “predominantly” in milestone payments — to acquire a San Diego biotech that has disclosed little about its pipeline.

 The startup, RayThera, debuted last year with a little more ...

items.title: Jazz turns to AbCellera for T cell engagers in up to $4.1B partnership
items.description:
For much of its first decade, Canadian antibody developer AbCellera signed partnership after partnership, securing 40 biopharma alliances that led to more than a dozen clinical-stage drug candidates.

items.title: B cell therapy maker Be Bio stops hemophilia trial
items.description: Be Biopharma disclosed in a federal clinical trials listing that it has terminated its study of a hemophilia B therapy made by editing a patient’s own cells. It was one of ...

items.title: Lilly buys another pain biotech; FDA sets decision for once-weekly PrEP pill
items.description:
